name: eazo-factory
description: Generate bilingual, polished Eazo apps with Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Generate a bilingual, reviewed Eazo app from one prompt.
interface.longDescription: Eazo Factory turns one product prompt, Xiaohongshu link, or screenshot set into a standardized bilingual Eazo app using the official Eazo Next.js template, a $imagegen UI reference board with an asset library, deterministic checks, mandatory independent review, and a visual onboarding guide for first-time users.
capabilities: Generate standardized Eazo apps from the official template
Extract app briefs from Xiaohongshu links and screenshots
Create UI reference boards with reusable asset libraries
Audit every interactive control with an independent reviewer
defaultPrompt: Use @eazo-factory to show visual onboarding or create one Eazo app from a prompt, link, or screenshots.
